Issue: Does not specify the format for the PCAP file
Correction: The system shall accept PCAP files in the standard libpcap format (e.g., .pcap, .pcapng).

Issue: Does not specify the supported versions of Firefox and Chromium-based browsers
Correction: The system shall support the current stable versions of Firefox (94.0.2) and Chromium-based browsers like Google Chrome (96.0.4664.45) or Microsoft Edge (96.0.1054.34).

Label: /F10/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum file size for PCAP files
Correction: The system shall support loading PCAP files up to a maximum size of 2GB.

Label: /F20/
Issue: Does not specify the default values for the preprocessor configuration
Correction: The default values for the preprocessor configuration shall be: Length scaling: 150, Value scaling: Off, Normalization: None, Autoencoder and PCA are selected, Number of hidden layers: 4, Number of nodes in hidden layers: (256, 64, 32, 8), Loss function: MSE, Number of epochs for the training: 100, Optimizer: adam.

Label: /F22/
Issue: Does not specify the expected time for preprocessing to complete
Correction: The system shall complete the preprocessing of a PCAP file within 5 minutes for files up to 2GB in size.

Label: /F30/
Issue: Does not specify the color coding for different protocols
Correction: The system shall use distinct colors for each protocol in the network topology graph, such as blue for TCP, green for UDP, and red for ICMP.

Label: /F40/
Issue: Does not specify the visual representation for different protocols
Correction: The system shall use distinct shapes and colors for each protocol in the preprocessor results graph, such as circles for TCP, squares for UDP, and triangles for ICMP.

Label: /F50/
Issue: Does not specify the performance metrics for PCA
Correction: The performance of the PCA shall be described by two values: the loss on the train data and the loss on the test data.

Label: /F60/
Issue: Does not specify the zoom levels for graphs
Correction: The system shall support zoom levels ranging from 10% to 200% for all graphs.

Label: /F70/
Issue: Does not specify the file formats for saving graphs and configurations
Correction: The system shall support saving graphs and configurations in PNG and JSON formats respectively.

Label: /F80/
Issue: Does not specify the comparison metrics for preprocessor runs
Correction: The system shall support comparison of preprocessor runs based on accuracy, loss, and execution time.

Label: /F90/
Issue: Does not specify the responsiveness criteria for asynchronous interaction
Correction: The system shall remain responsive to user input with a maximum delay of 1 second while the preprocessor is running.

Issue: Does not specify the error handling for invalid PCAP files
Correction: The system shall display an error message if an invalid PCAP file is loaded, and shall not proceed with preprocessing.

Issue: Does not specify the security measures for data protection
Correction: The system shall ensure that no information about the PCAP is accessible by inspecting the source of the website.

Issue: Does not specify the version of PyCharm to be used
Correction: The system shall use PyCharm 2021.1 or later as the IDE.

Issue: Does not specify the versions of plotly and pytest to be used
Correction: The system shall use plotly version 5.3.1 and pytest version 6.2.5 for the GUI and testing respectively.
